name: Elaine's Famous Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and powdered sugar.
2. Gradually add in the granulated sugar, eggs, salad oil, vanilla, and lemon peel. Mix until light and fluffy.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, cream of tartar, salt, and colored sugar (if using).
4. Gradually mix the dry ingredients into the butter mixture until well combined.
5. Wrap the dough in wax paper and refrigerate for several hours.
6. Preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
7. On a floured surface, form heaping teaspoons of dough into balls.
8. Place each ball onto prepared cookie sheets, flattening slightly with the bottom of a glass dipped in sugar.
9. Sprinkle with plain or colored sugar.
10. Bake for 8-10 minutes until lightly browned.
11. Allow to cool on the cookie sheet for 2-3 minutes before removing.
A wonderful tea cookie - you can color the sugar for Christmas cookies. From my dear friend, Elaine Sullivan.
